mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT r.role_code FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND (ur.expire_date IS NULL OR ur.expire_date >= CURDATE())

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 1 AND rp.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND (ur.expire_date IS NULL OR ur.expire_date >= CURDATE())
